title: Why We Are Buying The Dip In Stanley Black & Decker
text: Why We Are Buying The Dip In Stanley Black & Decker

title: Stanley Black & Decker Announces First Recipients of $25 Million Empower Makers Global Impact Challenge
text: $3 million in grants and nearly $1 million in tools are being provided to organizations supporting workforce development initiatives Recipients represent the first cohort in 5-year commitment toward skilling 3 million makers Grants to empower roughly 180,000 individuals in 2022 through vocational skills training NEW BRITAIN, Conn. , March 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) announced today the recipients of its inaugural Empower Makers Global Impact Challenge grant program.

title: Stanley Black & Decker Announces Release Date for First Quarter 2022 Earnings
text: NEW BRITAIN, Conn. , March 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) will broadcast its first quarter 2022 earnings conference call on Thursday, April 28, 2022.

title: 3 Stocks That Have Paid a Dividend for at Least 140 Consecutive Years
text: Income stocks don't come steadier than this trio.

title: The BLACK+DECKER® dustbuster® AdvancedClean™ Slim Cordless Hand Vacuum Sweeps Up a Better Homes & Gardens 2022 Clean House Award
text: TOWSON, Md., March 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- BLACK+DECKER®, a Stanley Black & Decker brand (NYSE: SWK), announced today that its dustbuster® AdvancedClean™ Slim Cordless Hand Vacuum (HLVC315B10) has been awarded Best Hand Vacuum by Better Homes & Gardens in the 2022 Clean House Awards.

title: DEWALT POWERSTACK™ Batteries More Than Stack Up For Construction and Trade Professionals
text: TOWSON, Md., March 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DEWALT, a Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) brand and industry leader in total jobsite solutions, announced today that the DEWALT POWERSTACK™ 20V MAX* Compact Battery, the world's first pouch cell battery designed for the construction industry, has been met with rave reviews from construction and trade professionals for its technological breakthrough.

title: CRAFTSMAN® V-Series™ Wins Three Highly Coveted Popular Mechanics® 2022 Tool Awards; Recognized for Best Allen Wrenches, Wrench Set and Screwdriver Set
text: TOWSON, Md., March 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- CRAFTSMAN, a Stanley Black & Decker brand (NYSE: SWK), announced today that is has been awarded three Popular Mechanics® 2022 Tool Awards, which represent the year's best-in-class products in various tool categories.

title: Stanley Black & Decker Announces $2.0 Billion Accelerated Share Repurchase Program
text: NEW BRITAIN, Conn., March 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) (the "Company") today announced it entered into certain accelerated share repurchase agreements ("ASR Agreements") with Bank of America, N.A.

title: Stanley Black & Decker To Present At The Raymond James 43rd Institutional Investors Conference
text: NEW BRITAIN, Conn., March 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) invites investors and the general public to listen to a webcast of a presentation by Don Allan, President and CFO, at the Raymond James 43rd Institutional Investors Conference on Monday, March 7, 2022 at 11:35 AM ET.
